name: birthday-memory-site
description: A password-encrypted birthday memory website for GitHub Pages.

scripts.lock: npm run build:source && staticrypt .private/build/index.html -d docs --config false --remember false --template-title "A little something for you" --template-instructions "Enter the secret from your birthday card" --template-button "Open your surprise" --template-error "That secret did not work - try again" --template-color-primary "#b74b67" --template-color-secondary "#fff7f4" && node scripts/harden-output.mjs
